way(id:4583259,38279772).tags: SELECT t.osm_id, t.osm_type, t.tags, NULL AS "nodes", NULL AS "members", NULL AS "geom", NULL AS "bbox_west", NULL AS "bbox_east" FROM (SELECT osm_id, osm_type, tags, geom FROM postpass_line WHERE osm_type='W' UNION SELECT osm_id, osm_type, tags, geom FROM postpass_polygon WHERE osm_type='W') t WHERE osm_id = ANY('{4583259,38279772}')
way(id:4583259,38279772).tags-members: SELECT t.osm_id, t.osm_type, t.tags, w.nodes, r.members, NULL AS "geom", NULL AS "bbox_west", NULL AS "bbox_east" FROM (SELECT osm_id, osm_type, tags, geom FROM postpass_line WHERE osm_type='W' UNION SELECT osm_id, osm_type, tags, geom FROM postpass_polygon WHERE osm_type='W') t left join planet_osm_ways w on t.osm_type = 'W' and t.osm_id = w.id left join planet_osm_rels r on t.osm_type = 'R' and t.osm_id = r.id WHERE osm_id = ANY('{4583259,38279772}')

way[highway](4583259).tags: SELECT t.osm_id, t.osm_type, t.tags, NULL AS "nodes", NULL AS "members", NULL AS "geom", NULL AS "bbox_west", NULL AS "bbox_east" FROM (SELECT osm_id, osm_type, tags, geom FROM postpass_line WHERE osm_type='W' UNION SELECT osm_id, osm_type, tags, geom FROM postpass_polygon WHERE osm_type='W') t WHERE t.tags?'highway' AND osm_id = ANY('{4583259}')
way[highway](4583259).tags-members: SELECT t.osm_id, t.osm_type, t.tags, w.nodes, r.members, NULL AS "geom", NULL AS "bbox_west", NULL AS "bbox_east" FROM (SELECT osm_id, osm_type, tags, geom FROM postpass_line WHERE osm_type='W' UNION SELECT osm_id, osm_type, tags, geom FROM postpass_polygon WHERE osm_type='W') t left join planet_osm_ways w on t.osm_type = 'W' and t.osm_id = w.id left join planet_osm_rels r on t.osm_type = 'R' and t.osm_id = r.id WHERE t.tags?'highway' AND osm_id = ANY('{4583259}')

(node[place=continent];way(4583259);).tags: SELECT osm_id, osm_type, tags, nodes, members, geom, bbox_west, bbox_east FROM (SELECT t.osm_id, t.osm_type, t.tags, NULL AS "nodes", NULL AS "members", NULL AS "geom", NULL AS "bbox_west", NULL AS "bbox_east" FROM postpass_point t WHERE ((t.tags->>'place'='continent')) UNION SELECT t.osm_id, t.osm_type, t.tags, NULL AS "nodes", NULL AS "members", NULL AS "geom", NULL AS "bbox_west", NULL AS "bbox_east" FROM (SELECT osm_id, osm_type, tags, geom FROM postpass_line WHERE osm_type='W' UNION SELECT osm_id, osm_type, tags, geom FROM postpass_polygon WHERE osm_type='W') t WHERE ((osm_id = ANY('{4583259}')))) t
(node[place=continent];way(4583259);).tags-members: SELECT osm_id, osm_type, tags, nodes, members, geom, bbox_west, bbox_east FROM (SELECT t.osm_id, t.osm_type, t.tags, '{}'::bigint[] AS "nodes", '{}'::jsonb AS "members", NULL AS "geom", NULL AS "bbox_west", NULL AS "bbox_east" FROM postpass_point t WHERE ((t.tags->>'place'='continent')) UNION SELECT t.osm_id, t.osm_type, t.tags, w.nodes, r.members, NULL AS "geom", NULL AS "bbox_west", NULL AS "bbox_east" FROM (SELECT osm_id, osm_type, tags, geom FROM postpass_line WHERE osm_type='W' UNION SELECT osm_id, osm_type, tags, geom FROM postpass_polygon WHERE osm_type='W') t left join planet_osm_ways w on t.osm_type = 'W' and t.osm_id = w.id left join planet_osm_rels r on t.osm_type = 'R' and t.osm_id = r.id WHERE ((osm_id = ANY('{4583259}')))) t

nwr[highway];node(w);.tags: SELECT rec0.osm_id, rec0.osm_type, t.tags, NULL AS "nodes", NULL AS "members", NULL AS "geom", NULL AS "bbox_west", NULL AS "bbox_east" FROM postpass_point t RIGHT JOIN (select CASE WHEN node_id IS NOT NULL THEN node_id ELSE CAST(member->>'ref' as bigint) END osm_id, CASE WHEN node_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'N' ELSE member->>'type' END osm_type from (SELECT unnest(nodes) AS node_id, jsonb_array_elements(members) AS member FROM postpass_pointlinepolygon t left join planet_osm_ways w on t.osm_type = 'W' and t.osm_id = w.id left join planet_osm_rels r on t.osm_type = 'R' and t.osm_id = r.id WHERE t.tags?'highway')) rec0 ON t.osm_id=rec0.osm_id and t.osm_type=rec0.osm_type
